LAW AND MOTION, 302, RULING: THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. AT THE CONCLUSION OF ARGUMENT, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANTS CORONITAS BAR & GRILL AND JOEL NAVAREZ' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED. THE COMPLAINT ADEQUATELY APPRISES DEFENDANTS OF THE ALLEGATIONS AGAINST THEM. (SEE GENERALLY CAL. PRAC. GUIDE, CIV. PRO. BEFORE TRIAL, CH. 7(I)-A, 7:84-86.) ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER CSR# 5976.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-02-2015 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-19-2014 Set For Trial On Mar-23-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-04-2014 Overruled
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
David J. Yang, Esq. of the Law Offices of David J. Yang, Tel. 415.982.7315, for defendants and moving party;
Matthew S. Da Vega, Esq. of Da Vega & Fisher, Tel. 805.232.4471, for plaintiff and opposing party, by Court Call.

RULING: The matter was argued. At the conclusion of argument, the Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS CORONITAS BAR & GRILL AND JOEL NAVAREZ' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is overruled. The complaint adequately apprises defendants of the allegations against them. (See generally Cal. Prac. Guide, Civ. Pro. Before Trial, Ch. 7(I)-A, 7:84-86.) Order signed. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR# 5976.
